summary: Completed frontend testing of new Legal Document Management features: PDF/DOCX exports, Assistant tab, share functionality, and reanalyze options. All requested features are present and functional, with appropriate empty state handling.
passed_tests: Navigate to existing dossier 'Affaire Dupont c/ Martin'
Assistant tab visibility and accessibility in dossier view
Export dropdown in header with PDF, DOCX, ZIP options
Share button functionality and link creation
Shared link access and chronology tab in shared view
All three tabs (Pieces, Chronology, Assistant) present and clickable
Appropriate empty state messages when no pieces exist
Chronology export buttons (contextually hidden when empty)
Assistant functionality with proper validation message
